====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
Saturn reappeared in ''[[JNS01|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 1)]]'' through ''[[JNS04|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 4)]]'', leading the resurrected Team Galactic in an attempt to bring back Cyrus. As the first step of the operation, he successfully {{pkmn2|caught}} a {{p|Heatran}} in order to power a device meant to open a gate to the world that Cyrus had disappeared into. The operation, however, experienced a setback when the energy cannon exploded and Heatran went on a rampage. Saturn and the other Commanders later faced Ash and his friends in order to stop them from interfering with Team Galactic's plan, but the Commanders were ultimately defeated and captured by {{an|Cynthia}} and placed back under arrest by [[Officer Jenny]], ending their plan in failure.
